siteName.label: Site Name
siteName.description: The name shown everywhere the platform refers to itself — header, page titles, emails, and exported documents.

confirm.message: This changes the site name to "{newName}" across the whole page — header, page titles, emails, and exported documents. The page will reload to apply the change.

error.detail: Could not update the site name.

ai.title: AI Features

toggle.label: Enable AI Features
toggle.description: When disabled, all AI-powered features are turned off system-wide.

circuitBreaker.label: Circuit Breaker
circuitBreaker.description: Automatically disables AI after consecutive failures. Resets after a cooldown period of {cooldown} min.

ai.statusWarning: AI features are currently unavailable for all users.

loadError.detail: Could not load AI feature status.

enabled.detail: AI features have been enabled system-wide.

disabled.detail: AI features have been disabled system-wide.

toggleError.detail: Could not update the AI feature toggle.

circuitBreakerReset.detail: The circuit breaker has been reset. AI requests are allowed again.

resetError.detail: Could not reset the circuit breaker.
